ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine in the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission in the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the component */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the component */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the specification (e.g., coolant capacity) */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the specification (e.g., engine overhaul) */,
  "standard_or_new" TEXT /* Standard or new value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the specification */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the specification */,
  "tolerance" TEXT /* Tolerance level for the specification */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used to test the specification */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification status of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the record belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component replaced or serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., replacement, top-off) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at the time of maintenance */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_and_materials" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part or material */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part or material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part or material */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the part or material */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for the part */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the part */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the schedule belongs to */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date the schedule is due */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Maintenance interval (e.g., every 5000 miles) */,
  "last_done" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at which the next maintenance is due */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance schedule */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule the reminder belongs to */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is due */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time before the schedule when the reminder should be sent */,
  "sent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the reminder has been sent */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "sent_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who sent the notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address of the user who received the notification */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES maintenance_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranties" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the warranty belongs to */,
  "warranty_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty started */,
  "warranty_type" TEXT /* Type of warranty (e.g., manufacturer, extended) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Description of what is covered under the warranty */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of any warranty claims */,
  "claim_number" TEXT /* Claim number for any warranty claims */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranties_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recalls" (
  "recall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recall */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the recall belongs to */,
  "recall_date" TEXT /* Date the recall was issued */,
  "recall_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recall */,
  "recall_number" TEXT /* Unique recall number */,
  "recall_status" TEXT /* Status of the recall (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of the resolution for the recall */,
  "parts_required" TEXT /* List of parts required for the recall */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recalls_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tsbs" (
  "tsb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TSB */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the TSB belongs to */,
  "tsb_date" TEXT /* Date the TSB was issued */,
  "tsb_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the TSB */,
  "tsb_number" TEXT /* Unique TSB number */,
  "tsb_status" TEXT /* Status of the TSB (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of the resolution for the TSB */,
  "parts_required" TEXT /* List of parts required for the TSB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tsb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tsbs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, mechanic) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the user's supervisor */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
